title: CodeGrind: AI-Assisted DSA Practice Gets a Cyberpunk Edge
summary: Show how CodeGrind blends DSA practice with AI guidance and an evolving cyberpunk game aesthetic, highlighting real-time editor, Azure OpenAI assistant, and new sign-in features.
core_message: CodeGrind merges interactive DSA challenges with AI-assisted problem solving, a real-time editor, and a cyberpunk tower-defense visualization to reinforce concepts from For loops to functions. This daily piece spotlights the learning flow, AI guidance, and a fresh cyberpunk theme without hype, grounded in our current features and recent updates.
cta: Try CodeGrind now and practice a problem with AI help available in-editor.
visual_brief: A short 15–20s motion clip showing the CodeGrind editor with problem prompt on one side, AI assistant chat on the other, and a dynamic cyberpunk tower-defense visualization in the background. Include subtle UI cues like a sign-in flow, code snippets rendering, and a progress bar to imply real-time feedback.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
